definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="ArrayList" id="entity">entity</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="text_print"><value name="TEXT"><block type="world_data_moon_phase"></block></value><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">world instanceof ServerLevel server</field></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">ServerLevel serverlevel = server;</field><next><block type="variables_set_arraylist"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entity</field><value name="VAL"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">serverlevel.getEntities().getAll()</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="return_arraylist"><value name="return"><block type="variables_get_arraylist"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entity</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
